subject: Human Resources
title: HR as a Strategic Partner
description: A 60-second lesson on HR as a Strategic Partner.

hook.text: A CEO says: 'HR is just paperwork and parties.' Three years later, they can't hire, retain, or develop talent.

buildup.text: Dave Ulrich repositioned HR into four roles: strategic partner, change agent, employee champion, and admin expert.

discovery.text: Strategic HR aligns workforce planning with business strategy—ensuring the right people with the right skills at the right time.

twist.text: Most HR departments are still buried in transactions—payroll, compliance, paperwork—with little time for strategic work.

climax.text: Automating admin frees HR to focus on what matters: culture, capability, leadership development, and organizational design.

punchline.text: HR isn't overhead. It's the infrastructure that makes everything else work.

quiz.question: Who created the model that repositioned HR as a strategic partner?
